ticket.title: yah-ui Board parity with yah board CLI: timestamps, sort, smell, archive flow
Surface last-modified timestamp on WireWorkItem (latest event ts from .yah/events/{id}.jsonl)
Board sort: last-touched desc primary, id asc secondary (default)

after: R025-T1: surface last-modified timestamp on WireWorkItem from .yah/events/{id}.jsonl latest entry
R025-T2: Board sort — last-touched desc primary, id asc secondary as default
Future: archive button (with @yah:verify smoke prompt), prompt button (review-mode vs pickup-mode), childCounts smell badges on zones, disappeared-event surfacing
Read .yah/events/{id}.jsonl tail and expose latest record's `t` (unix seconds) as `last_modified_ts: u64` on WireWorkItem
Fallback when no event shard exists: use the source file's mtime so freshly-claimed tickets sort sensibly
Mirror the field in yah-ui/src/env/types.ts WireWorkItem so the renderer can read it
Depends on R025-T1: WireWorkItem must carry a last-modified ts before the sort can land
Sort applies per-column in Board.tsx; secondary id sort uses natural-numeric compare so R025-T2 sorts before R025-T10

R025-T1 (last_modified_ts on WireWorkItem, daemon shard-scan + mtime fallback) and R025-T2 (Board column sort by recency desc, id asc tiebreak with numeric collator) are both in review. cargo build -p yah-kg-daemon and yah-ui tsc both clean.

before: R025-T1: surface last-modified timestamp on WireWorkItem from .yah/events/{id}.jsonl latest entry
R025-T2: Board sort — last-touched desc primary, id asc secondary as default
Future: archive button (with @yah:verify smoke prompt), prompt button (review-mode vs pickup-mode), childCounts smell badges on zones, disappeared-event surfacing
after: R025-T1: surface last-modified timestamp on WireWorkItem from .yah/events/{id}.jsonl latest entry
R025-T2: Board sort — last-touched desc primary, id asc secondary as default
Future: archive button (with @yah:verify smoke prompt), prompt button (review-mode vs pickup-mode), childCounts smell badges on zones, disappeared-event surfacing

Claim a sub-ticket under R025 for the archive flow: card archive button must surface @yah:verify lines as a confirm prompt (two-stage click — arm reveals verify, second click commits) before invoking the existing archive RPC.

ticket.title: Prompt button generates real pickup/review prompt + copies to clipboard
next_steps: Wire onClick on the 'prompt' CardButton to a generator: review-mode when card is in Review column (verify steps + approve/send-back framing), pickup-mode otherwise (yah board show <ID> --prompt content)
Generator can run client-side from the existing Ticket fields (handoff/nextSteps/gotchas/verify) — mirrors the CLI's to_prompt_with_ctx output. No new RPC needed for v1
Copy to clipboard via navigator.clipboard.writeText; flash a toast or button-state change so the user sees it landed
Stretch: a server-side prompt RPC so the generator stays in sync with the canonical CLI output (yah board prompt <id>)

ticket.title: Relay selector filters Board: scope cards to children of activeRelayId
next_steps: Thread activeRelayId from App.tsx into Board (currently only read by TitleBar/AgentView)
Board filters tickets where t.id === activeRelayId OR t.parent === activeRelayId; null/undefined activeRelayId shows everything (current behavior)
Empty-state when filter is set + no matches: 'no children for <relay>' splash with a 'clear filter' affordance
Stretch: visual cue in column headers showing the filter is active (eyebrow text or rule color)

ticket.title: Relay selector filters Board: scope cards to children of activeRelayId
next_steps: Thread activeRelayId from App.tsx into Board (currently only read by TitleBar/AgentView)
Board filters tickets where t.id === activeRelayId OR t.parent === activeRelayId; null/undefined activeRelayId shows everything (current behavior)
Empty-state when filter is set + no matches: 'no children for <relay>' splash with a 'clear filter' affordance
Stretch: visual cue in column headers showing the filter is active (eyebrow text or rule color)

sourceLines: //! @yah:relay(R025, "yah-ui Board parity with yah board CLI: timestamps, sort, smell, archive flow")
//! @yah:status(in-progress)
//! @yah:assignee(agent:claude)
//! @yah:next("R025-T1: surface last-modified timestamp on WireWorkItem from .yah/events/{id}.jsonl latest entry")
//! @yah:next("R025-T2: Board sort — last-touched desc primary, id asc secondary as default")
//! @yah:next("Future: archive button (with @yah:verify smoke prompt), prompt button (review-mode vs pickup-mode), childCounts smell badges on zones, disappeared-event surfacing")

//! @yah:handoff("R025-T1 (last_modified_ts on WireWorkItem, daemon shard-scan + mtime fallback) and R025-T2 (Board column sort by recency desc, id asc tiebreak with numeric collator) are both in review. cargo build -p yah-kg-daemon and yah-ui tsc both clean.")

//! @yah:next("Claim a sub-ticket under R025 for the archive flow: card archive button must surface @yah:verify lines as a confirm prompt (two-stage click — arm reveals verify, second click commits) before invoking the existing archive RPC.")
//! @yah:ticket(R025-T2, "Board sort: last-touched desc primary, id asc secondary (default)")
//! @yah:status(review)
//! @yah:assignee(agent:claude)
//! @yah:parent(R025)
//! @yah:next("Depends on R025-T1: WireWorkItem must carry a last-modified ts before the sort can land")
//! @yah:next("Sort applies per-column in Board.tsx; secondary id sort uses natural-numeric compare so R025-T2 sorts before R025-T10")
//! @yah:ticket(R025-T4, "Relay selector filters Board: scope cards to children of activeRelayId")
//! @yah:assignee(agent:claude)
//! @yah:status(review)
//! @yah:parent(R025)
//! @yah:next("Thread activeRelayId from App.tsx into Board (currently only read by TitleBar/AgentView)")
//! @yah:next("Board filters tickets where t.id === activeRelayId OR t.parent === activeRelayId; null/undefined activeRelayId shows everything (current behavior)")
//! @yah:next("Empty-state when filter is set + no matches: 'no children for <relay>' splash with a 'clear filter' affordance")
//! @yah:next("Stretch: visual cue in column headers showing the filter is active (eyebrow text or rule color)")
